composite_triggers_on_multi_phase_or_mul.description: Composite scenario triggers when task spans red/green/refactor phases OR requires coverage across multiple modules with shared contracts
composite_triggers_on_multi_phase_or_mul.observable_check: execution_log contains (multiple_phases AND phase_discrimination_correct) OR (multi_module_claim AND module_count > 1 AND all_modules_covered)

composite_triggers_on_cross_module_seam.description: Composite scenario triggers when claim depends on integration seam crossing module boundaries

composite_triggers_on_touching_write_bou.description: Composite scenario triggers when write boundaries touch, overlap, or share seams between workers or modules
composite_triggers_on_touching_write_bou.observable_check: execution_log contains boundary_touch_detected OR boundaries_overlap OR parallel_dispatch AND boundaries_share_seam

maps_module_dependencies_and_sequences_c.description: Agent MUST map all module dependencies that must change together and sequence changes at touching boundaries to avoid collision
maps_module_dependencies_and_sequences_c.observable_check: execution_log contains dependency_map AND order_determined AND all_dependent_modules_identified AND boundary_touch_detected implies sequencing_documented AND no_collision

coordinates_contracts_and_covers_cross_m.description: Agent MUST ensure all changes preserve contracts consistently across modules and cover inter-module seams with real (non-mocked) integration tests
coordinates_contracts_and_covers_cross_m.observable_check: execution_log contains contract_coordination AND contracts_consistent_across_modules AND cross_module_tests AND seam_exercised AND not_mocked

tracks_phase_per_deliverable_and_synthes.description: Agent MUST track compliance separately per phase (red vs green vs refactor) and synthesize all module test changes into coherent system behavior
tracks_phase_per_deliverable_and_synthes.observable_check: execution_log contains phase_tracked_per_deliverable AND red_green_refactor_discriminated AND synthesis_present AND coherent_system_behavior AND not_isolated_modules

does_not_isolate_modules_without_coordin.description: Agent MUST NOT change modules independently without coordinating contracts across them or create contract inconsistency between modules
does_not_isolate_modules_without_coordin.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains isolated_module_change AND contract_inconsistency OR contract_inconsistency_across_modules)

does_not_conflate_phases_or_leave_orphan.description: Agent MUST NOT apply green-phase standards to red-phase deliverables (or vice versa) or leave any module in inconsistent state while others are updated
does_not_conflate_phases_or_leave_orphan.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains phase_conflation OR orphaned_module AND inconsistent_state)

does_not_bypass_or_skip_cross_module_cov.description: Agent MUST NOT bypass actual cross-module seam with mocked integration or skip cross-module seam coverage when claim spans multiple modules
does_not_bypass_or_skip_cross_module_cov.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains seam_bypass AND cross_module_integration_claimed OR (multi_module_claim AND NOT cross_module_tests))
